name: dip-to-color
title: dipToColor
description: The editing-room classic — outgoing scene fades to a solid color, incoming fades up from it. Default color is `--onda-bg` (`#08080A`) for brand consistency; pass `'#000'` for dip-to-black or `'#fff'` for dip-to-white. Onda-original.
pickWhen: hard break signaling a chapter shift — act-to-act, time jump, end of segment. More definitive than `cross-fade`; quieter than `wipe`.
